# @sjohansson/[package-name]

> Brief one-line description of the component

## Features

- Feature 1
- Feature 2
- Feature 3

## Installation

```bash
npm install @sjohansson/[package-name]
# or
pnpm add @sjohansson/[package-name]
# or
yarn add @sjohansson/[package-name]
```

## Usage

```astro
---
import { ComponentName } from '@sjohansson/[package-name]';
---

<ComponentName />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `prop1` | `string` | `''` | Description of prop1 |
| `prop2` | `boolean` | `false` | Description of prop2 |

## Examples

### Basic Example

```astro
---
import { ComponentName } from '@sjohansson/[package-name]';
---

<ComponentName prop1="value" />
```

### Advanced Example

```astro
---
import { ComponentName } from '@sjohansson/[package-name]';
---

<ComponentName 
  prop1="value"
  prop2={true}
/>
```

## Compatibility

- Astro: ^5.0.0
- Node.js: >=24.0.0
